no: ToB-only NPC companion. Same character as Aurora from Aurora's Shoes and Boots shop mod, but separate mod. 2 portrait choices during install.. mod_installer: Uses ACTION_READLN. May require interactive input. mod_installer: ACTION_READLN for portrait selection. Requires manual input.
sum: Adds Aurora as a joinable NPC companion in Throne of Bhaal with dialogue, items, and an epilogue.
